_note: The well-known DNS-root analog for the RAPP network. Pure-raw discoverable at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/RAPP/main/.well-known/rapp-network-seed.json. Sniffers BFS from this seed across operators' beacons (each beacon's federation_hints[] adds new nodes). No Search API required; no rate limits for public raw URLs.
constitutional_article: Article XLVII — Discoverability Without A Central Registry
self_replication_note: Anyone can fork kody-w/RAPP and host their own seed at <handle>/RAPP/main/.well-known/rapp-network-seed.json. Sniffers can start from any seed; the network is a graph, not a tree.
how_to_add_yourself: Open a PR against kody-w/RAPP modifying this file. Include your github handle, estate_url, beacon_url, and (optionally) grail_url. Or — preferred — get listed in some other operator's beacon's federation_hints[] and the next sniff pass will pick you up transitively.
